creator: kes-kes@yandex.ru
text:
while pinging other host server is rebooted.
it is repeatable.

server reboots without any messages in /var/log/messages /var/log/console /var/crash

#last -n20
usr        pts/0    10.11.6.10             Wed Feb 15 10:59   still logged in
boot time                                  Wed Feb 15 10:59
usr        pts/2    10.11.6.10             Wed Feb 15 10:54 - crash  (00:04)
usr        pts/0    10.11.6.10             Wed Feb 15 10:33 - crash  (00:25)

How-To-Repeat: ping -s 7400 -i 0.001 <ip>
wait about 5-10min
